headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson finally has his first postseason victory, and coming away from Baltimore makes it even more impressive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamar winless no more, leads Ravens to 20-13 win over Titans

events.name: Chicago Bears at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Drew Brees will get to celebrate his 42nd birthday by preparing for a playoff game that will also feature the one active NFL quarterback older than him.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brees, Saints pull away late for 21-9 playoff win over Bears

headlines.description: — So much for the weight of history. Or practicing. Or having your head coach on the sideline. Or your emotional leader on the field.
headlines.shortLinkText: Same old Browns? Hardly. Cleveland drills Steelers 48-37
